message:
test(conformance): update support matrix, conformance reports, CVE arena timestamps, and stub guard exclusions

Update all test and conformance artifacts to reflect the expanded ABI surface:

stub_guard_test.rs:
- Expand the static/global symbol exclusion list in
  implemented_symbols_have_abi_exports() to skip _IO_2_1_stdin_,
  _IO_2_1_stdout_, _IO_2_1_stderr_, __progname, __stack_chk_guard,
  program_invocation_name, and program_invocation_short_name, which
  are exported globals/statics rather than functions.

support_matrix.json:
- Refresh the comprehensive symbol support matrix to include all newly
  added ABI symbols with their implementation status, phase
  classification, and glibc version annotations.

conformance reports:
- cross_report_consistency.v1.json: Updated cross-report consistency
  check results reflecting expanded symbol counts.
- e2e_scenario_manifest.v1.json: Add new E2E test scenarios.
- reality_report.v1.json: Refresh reality report with current symbol
  tallies.
- support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json: Refresh maintenance report
  covering the expanded surface area.

CVE arena:
- Refresh generated_at timestamps in format_string_validation.v1.json,
  heap_overflow_validation.v1.json, and uaf_validation.v1.json to
  2026-02-26 to reflect latest validation run.
- Add bd-7cba/ directory with artifact_index.json and trace.jsonl for
  the iconv codec scope ledger validation evidence trail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
